title: RalphFoundryGoalManifest
description: Input contract for a Team-Gated Autonomous Ralph Foundry goal loop. JSON Schema is the source of truth for goal shape.

goal.description: Plain-language outcome the autonomous loop must achieve.

sourceRef.description: Planning source reference, such as a Notion page, story, or architecture prompt.

successCriteria.description: Objective conditions that prove the goal is achieved.

approvalMode.description: No routine human gate between runs; Team RAM internal gates review progress and only hard stops escalate.

internalGates.description: Canonical Team RAM agents plus non-agent control phases allowed to review, redirect, or stop the autonomous loop. judge is the Brooks/Jobs decision phase; learning is Allura Brain write-back.

runSelectionPolicy.description: How the judge selects the next bounded run.

allowedPaths.description: Repo-relative normalized path prefixes the loop may modify without escalation. Blocked paths take precedence over allowed paths.

blockedPaths.description: Repo-relative normalized path prefixes the loop must not modify. Blocked paths take precedence over allowed paths.

maxRuns.description: Maximum bounded runs before abandonment or escalation.

stopConditions.description: Hard stops that terminate or escalate the autonomous loop.

validationCommands.description: Goal-level validation or policy commands that must be runnable before the loop can claim success.

learningWriteBack.description: Every completed run writes a concise learning to Allura Brain.

extensions.description: Optional extension point for non-core integrations. v0.1 keeps external systems out of the base contract.

notionPageUrl.description: Manual Notion bridge for the goal source.

breakingChangePolicy.const: Only patch-level bumps are non-breaking; minor bumps require a migration step.

deprecationDate.description: Date after which this schema version may be removed when superseded.
